dialogue.line: *scoffs* I'm done playin' nice, you're REALLY startin' to piss me off!
*scoffs* You know what? Screw it, maybe I SHOULD just shoot you two!
I'M DONE PLAYING GAMES.
NOT to be a Debbie downer buuuut... according to you, it never WAS a game.
Do you understand...
Understand wha-
HOW INSANELY HARD IT IS... to go day by day, night after night... in this GOD forsaken, SHIT-sack, dumpter fire of a city?!
*inhales* DO YOU?!
And when I FINALLY get a chance, a chance to be something useful, and to prove myself to be worth more than this insufferable HELL hole...
You continue to resist, taking away my only chance!
Nah... *seeths* not anymore.
Dude calm down!
NO... IM GOING TO KILL YOU, right here... right now.
Your body full of lead and that damn serum in your blood draining from that thick skull of yours!
And I'll make sure your girlfriend gets to watch as you die before I end HER too.
Pico!!
Ugh... WHAT.
PLEASE tell me you weren't gonna do what I think you were gonna do!
We need them ALIVE.
You can't jeopardize this!
We need to regroup, come on.
Let him go.
We'll catch him soon enough... when the time is right.
Keep it together, P.
*sigh*
Don't call me, P.
But fine.
Screw you two!
Whatever man, let's get outta here babe.
Finally, we BLOWN' this popsicle stand...
Oh HIIIIII you two~!
Wha- MOM!?
Uh... you're related to this chick babe?
Hey you! I took a peek at your performance in the raveyard~
You've got balls kid! And a hot PIPING load of nice thick skill to go with em.
I suddenly feel extremely uncomfortable.
FINALLY, someone who understands my talent!
Tell ya what, I'm bout shoot a quick lil music vid before I get to this party I gotta head to...
SADLLLYY, I don't have ANYYYONE to duet with.
But YOU seem like a REAL good boy when it comes to this sorta thing, eh?
Aw shucks, glad you're such a big fan of my sick rappin'.
She is LITERALLY flirting with you!
Jealous much?
No cuddles tonight!!
Uhh, excuse me Mrs. Mearest but I'm going to need you to settle down with your flirtatious advances.
For I must allow myself to be cuddled soon in the late hours of a sleepless night.
What?
That being said, LET'S ROOOOOOOOOCK!!!
Can already tell this is gonna be a weird ride...
*sigh*... Here we go.
